problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: The key to Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? is Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics — specifically Monte Carlo tree — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
